  have hc : 0 < c := by linarith
  have hS : 0 < a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2 := by nlinarith
  have h_poly : (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * (a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2) < 1 := by
    have : a = 1 - b - c - d := by linarith
    nlinarith
  have h_log : a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d ≤ Real.log (a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2) := by
    let S := a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2
    have h_le (x : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x) : x * Real.log x - x * Real.log S ≤ x * (x / S - 1) := by
      rw [← mul_sub, Real.log_div hx.ne' hS.ne']
      exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (div_pos hx hS)) (le_of_lt hx)
    calc
      a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d
      _ = (a * Real.log a - a * Real.log S) + (b * Real.log b - b * Real.log S) +
          (c * Real.log c - c * Real.log S) + (d * Real.log d - d * Real.log S) + (a + b + c + d) * Real.log S := by ring
      _ = (a * Real.log a - a * Real.log S) + (b * Real.log b - b * Real.log S) +
          (c * Real.log c - c * Real.log S) + (d * Real.log d - d * Real.log S) + Real.log S := by rw [h1, one_mul]
      _ ≤ a * (a / S - 1) + b * (b / S - 1) + c * (c / S - 1) + d * (d / S - 1) + Real.log S := by
        gcongr; exact h_le a ha; exact h_le b hb; exact h_le c hc; exact h_le d hd0
      _ = Real.log S := by field_simp [hS.ne']; rw [h1]; ring
  have h_prod : a^a * b^b * c^c * d^d ≤ a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2 := by
    rw [Real.rpow_def_of_pos ha, Real.rpow_def_of_pos hb, Real.rpow_def_of_pos hc, Real.rpow_def_of_pos hd0,
      ← Real.exp_add, ← Real.exp_add, ← Real.exp_add, ← Real.exp_log hS, Real.exp_le_iff]
    exact h_log
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h_prod (by linarith)) h_poly

have ha : 0 < a := by linarith
  have hb : 0 < b := by linarith
  have hc : 0 < c := by linarith
  -- Jensen's inequality implies sum p_i log p_i <= log (sum p_i^2)
  have jensen : a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d ≤ 
      Real.log (a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2) := by
    let w := ![a, b, c, d]
    have hw_sum : ∑ i, w i = 1 := by simp [w, Fin.sum_univ_succ, h1]
    have hw_nonneg : ∀ i, 0 ≤ w i := by intro i; fin_cases i <;> linarith
    have h_vals : ∀ i, w i ∈ Set.Ioi 0 := by intro i; fin_cases i <;> assumption
    convert (Real.concaveOn_log_Ioi).le_map_sum hw_nonneg hw_sum h_vals using 1
    · simp [w, Fin.sum_univ_succ, pow_two]
    · simp [w, Fin.sum_univ_succ]
  -- Exponentiate to get bound on product
  have prod_bound : a^a * b^b * c^c * d^d ≤ a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2 := by
    have h_sq_pos : 0 < a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2 := by nlinarith
    rw [←Real.log_le_log_iff (by positivity) h_sq_pos]
    repeat rw [Real.log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity)]
    rw [Real.log_rpow ha, Real.log_rpow hb, Real.log_rpow hc, Real.log_rpow hd0]
    exact jensen
  -- Prove the polynomial inequality S * Q < 1
  have poly_ineq : (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * (a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2) < 1 := by
    have key : (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * (a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2) < (a + b + c + d) ^ 3 := by nlinarith
    rw [h1, one_pow] at key
    exact key
  -- Combine
  apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ poly_ineq
  gcongr
  · linarith
  · exact prod_bound

have ha : 0 < a := by linarith
  have hb : 0 < b := by linarith
  have hc : 0 < c := by linarith
  have hd : 0 < d := by linarith

  -- 1. Apply Jensen's inequality to show P ≤ ∑ x^2
  -- f(x) = log x is concave, so ∑ w_i log x_i ≤ log (∑ w_i x_i) with weights w_i = x_i
  have h_jensen : a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d ≤
      Real.log (a * a + b * b + c * c + d * d) := by
    let w : Fin 4 → ℝ := ![a, b, c, d]
    let v : Fin 4 → ℝ := ![a, b, c, d]
    have hw : ∑ i, w i = 1 := by
      simp [w, Finset.sum_fin_eq_sum_range, Finset.sum_range_succ]; exact h1
    have hpos : ∀ i, 0 < w i := by
      intro i; fin_cases i <;> assumption
    have h_conc : ConcaveOn ℝ (Set.Ioi 0) Real.log := Real.concaveOn_log_Ioi
    have := ConcaveOn.le_map_sum h_conc hpos hw (fun i => hpos i)
    simp [w, v, Finset.sum_fin_eq_sum_range, Finset.sum_range_succ] at this
    exact this

  have h_P_le_sq : a ^ a * b ^ b * c ^ c * d ^ d ≤ a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2 := by
    rw [←Real.log_le_log_iff, Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul]
    · simp only [Real.log_rpow ha, Real.log_rpow hb, Real.log_rpow hc, Real.log_rpow hd]
      exact h_jensen
    · positivity
    · positivity
    · positivity

  -- 2. Prove (a + 2b + 3c + 4d)(a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2) < 1
  -- This is a polynomial inequality that holds for ordered positive variables summing to 1
  have h_poly : (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * (a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2) < 1 := by
    nlinarith

  -- 3. Combine results
  apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ h_poly
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h_P_le_sq
  linarith

have hc : 0 < c := hd0.trans_le hdc
  have hb : 0 < b := hc.trans_le hcb
  have ha : 0 < a := hb.trans_le hba
  let S := a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d
  let Q := a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2
  have hS : 0 < S := by dsimp [S]; positivity
  have hSQ : S * Q < 1 := by
    rw [← h1, ← one_pow 3, ← h1]
    obtain ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩ := exists_add_of_le hdc
    obtain ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩ := exists_add_of_le hcb
    obtain ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ := exists_add_of_le hba
    dsimp [S, Q]
    ring_nf
    nlinarith
  rw [← Real.log_lt_iff_lt_exp (by positivity), Real.log_one]
  calc
    Real.log (S * a ^ a * b ^ b * c ^ c * d ^ d)
    _ = Real.log S + (a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d) := by
      repeat rw [Real.log_mul] <;> try positivity
      simp only [Real.log_rpow ha, Real.log_rpow hb, Real.log_rpow hc, Real.log_rpow hd]
      ring
    _ = a * Real.log (S * a) + b * Real.log (S * b) + c * Real.log (S * c) + d * Real.log (S * d) := by
      nth_rw 1 [← mul_one (Real.log S), ← h1]
      ring_nf
      repeat rw [Real.log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity)]
      ring
    _ ≤ a * (S * a - 1) + b * (S * b - 1) + c * (S * c - 1) + d * (S * d - 1) := by
      gcongr <;> apply Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos <;> positivity
    _ = S * Q - 1 := by
      dsimp [S, Q]
      rw [← h1]
      ring
    _ < 0 := by linarith

have ha : 0 < a := by linarith
  have hb : 0 < b := by linarith
  have hc : 0 < c := by linarith
  have h_amgm : a ^ a * b ^ b * c ^ c * d ^ d ≤ a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2 := by
    let w : Fin 4 → ℝ := ![a, b, c, d]
    have hw : ∑ i, w i = 1 := by simp [w, Fin.sum_univ_succ, h1]
    have hw_pos : ∀ i, 0 ≤ w i := by intro i; fin_cases i <;> simp [w] <;> linarith
    have h_val_pos : ∀ i, 0 < w i := by intro i; fin_cases i <;> simp [w] <;> assumption
    have := Real.concaveOn_log.le_map_sum w w hw hw_pos (fun i _ => h_val_pos i)
    rw [← Real.log_le_log_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)]
    simp [w, Fin.sum_univ_succ] at this ⊢
    convert this using 1
    · rw [Real.log_prod]
      · congr; ext i; fin_cases i <;> simp [Real.log_rpow]
      · intro i _; apply (h_val_pos i).ne'
    · congr; ext i; fin_cases i <;> simp [pow_two]
  have h_alg : (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2) < 1 := by
    rw [← h1]
    let x := a - b; let y := b - c; let z := c - d
    have hx : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
    have hy : 0 ≤ y := by linarith
    have hz : 0 ≤ z := by linarith
    have ha_eq : a = d + z + y + x := by linarith
    have hb_eq : b = d + z + y := by linarith
    have hc_eq : c = d + z := by linarith
    rw [ha_eq, hb_eq, hc_eq]
    ring_nf
    nlinarith
  calc
    (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * (a ^ a * b ^ b * c ^ c * d ^ d) 
      ≤ (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2) := by gcongr; exact h_amgm
    _ < 1 := h_alg

have ha : 0 < a := by linarith
  have hb : 0 < b := by linarith
  have hc : 0 < c := by linarith
  let S := a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d
  let Q := a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2
  
  -- 1. Prove a^a b^b c^c d^d ≤ Q (Weighted AM-GM form)
  have h_PQ : a ^ a * b ^ b * c ^ c * d ^ d ≤ Q := by
    rw [← Real.log_le_log_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)]
    simp only [Real.log_mul (by positivity), Real.log_rpow ha, Real.log_rpow hb, Real.log_rpow hc, Real.log_rpow hd0]
    -- Use Jensen's inequality consequence: ∑ x log(x/Q) ≤ ∑ (x/Q - 1) = 0
    have h_log_le (x : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x) : Real.log (x / Q) ≤ x / Q - 1 := Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (by positivity)
    have h_sum_zero : a * (a / Q - 1) + b * (b / Q - 1) + c * (c / Q - 1) + d * (d / Q - 1) = 0 := by
      field_simp [h1]; ring
    have h_expand : a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d - Real.log Q = 
                    a * Real.log (a / Q) + b * Real.log (b / Q) + c * Real.log (c / Q) + d * Real.log (d / Q) := by
      rw [← h1]; simp [Real.log_div, ha, hb, hc, hd0, (by positivity : 0 < Q)]; ring
    linarith [h_log_le a ha, h_log_le b hb, h_log_le c hc, h_log_le d hd0]

  -- 2. Prove S * Q < 1
  have h_SQ : S * Q < 1 := by
    rw [← h1, pow_two]
    have h_decomp : (a + b + c + d) * (a + b + c + d) - S * Q = 
        a * (2 * (b + c + d) - a * (b + 2 * c + 3 * d)) + 
        (2 * (b * c + b * d + c * d) - (b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2) * (b + 2 * c + 3 * d)) := by ring
    rw [h_decomp]
    have h_est1 : b + 2 * c + 3 * d ≤ 2 * (b + c + d) := by linarith
    have h_est2 : a < 1 := by linarith
    nlinarith

  -- 3. Combine
  nlinarith

have ha : 0 < a := by linarith
  have hb : 0 < b := by linarith
  have hc : 0 < c := by linarith
  let S := a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d
  let Q := a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2
  have hS : 0 < S := by positivity
  have hQ : 0 < Q := by positivity
  have h_alg : S * Q < 1 := by nlinarith
  have h_jensen : a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d ≤ Real.log Q := by
    let w := ![a, b, c, d]
    have hw_sum : ∑ i, w i = 1 := by simp [w, h1, Fin.sum_univ_succ]
    have hw_nonneg : ∀ i, 0 ≤ w i := by intro i; fin_cases i <;> simp [w] <;> linarith
    have h_vals : ∀ i, w i ∈ Set.Ioi 0 := by intro i; fin_cases i <;> simp [w] <;> linarith
    convert Real.strictConcaveOn_log.concaveOn.le_jensen_weighted Finset.univ hw_nonneg h_vals hw_sum using 1
    · simp [w, Fin.sum_univ_succ]
    · congr; simp [w, Q, Fin.sum_univ_succ]
  rw [← Real.log_lt_zero_iff (by positivity)]
  rw [Real.log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity)]
  simp only [Real.log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity), Real.log_rpow ha, Real.log_rpow hb, Real.log_rpow hc, Real.log_rpow hd]
  calc
    Real.log S + (a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d)
      ≤ Real.log S + Real.log Q := add_le_add_left h_jensen _
    _ = Real.log (S * Q) := (Real.log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity)).symm
    _ < Real.log 1 := Real.log_lt_log (by positivity) h_alg
    _ = 0 := Real.log_one

have ha : 0 < a := by linarith
  have hb : 0 < b := by linarith
  have hc : 0 < c := by linarith
  let Q := a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2
  have hQ : 0 < Q := by nlinarith
  have log_bound (x : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x) : x * Real.log x ≤ x * Real.log Q + x^2 / Q - x := by
    have := Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (div_pos hx hQ)
    rw [Real.log_div hx.ne' hQ.ne'] at this
    field_simp [hQ.ne'] at this ⊢
    linear_combination x * this
  have sum_log_le : a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d ≤ Real.log Q := by
    calc
      _ ≤ (a * Real.log Q + a^2 / Q - a) + (b * Real.log Q + b^2 / Q - b) +
          (c * Real.log Q + c^2 / Q - c) + (d * Real.log Q + d^2 / Q - d) := by
            gcongr <;> apply log_bound <;> assumption
      _ = Real.log Q := by rw [h1]; field_simp [hQ.ne']; ring
  have pow_le_Q : a ^ a * b ^ b * c ^ c * d ^ d ≤ Q := by
    rw [← Real.exp_le_exp, Real.exp_log hQ]
    simp_rw [Real.rpow_def_of_pos ha, Real.rpow_def_of_pos hb, Real.rpow_def_of_pos hc, Real.rpow_def_of_pos hd0,
      ← Real.exp_add, Real.exp_le_exp]
    exact sum_log_le
  have alg_ineq : (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * Q < 1 := by
    have : a = 1 - b - c - d := by linarith
    rw [this]
    nlinarith
  apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ alg_ineq
  gcongr
  linarith

let w : Fin 4 → ℝ := ![a, b, c, d]
  have hw_nonneg : ∀ i ∈ Finset.univ, 0 ≤ w i := by
    intro i _; fin_cases i <;> simp [w] <;> linarith
  have hw_sum : ∑ i, w i = 1 := by
    simp [w, Fin.sum_univ_succ, h1]
  have amgm := Real.geom_mean_le_arith_mean_weighted Finset.univ w w hw_nonneg hw_sum
  simp only [w, Fin.prod_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_succ] at amgm
  suffices (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2) < 1 by
    exact lt_of_le_of_lt (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left amgm (by linarith)) this
  nlinarith

have ha : 0 < a := by linarith
  have hb : 0 < b := by linarith
  have hc : 0 < c := by linarith
  let u := a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d
  have hu : 0 < u := by linarith
  have h_alg : u * (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2) < 1 := by
    calc u * (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2)
      _ < (a + b + c + d) ^ 3 := by nlinarith
      _ = 1 := by rw [h1]; ring
  rw [← Real.log_lt_zero_iff]
  · rw [Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul]
    · rw [Real.log_rpow ha, Real.log_rpow hb, Real.log_rpow hc, Real.log_rpow hd0]
      have : a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d + Real.log u =
             a * Real.log (a * u) + b * Real.log (b * u) + c * Real.log (c * u) + d * Real.log (d * u) := by
        simp [Real.log_mul, ha.ne', hb.ne', hc.ne', hd0.ne', hu.ne']
        rw [← add_mul, h1, one_mul]
      rw [this]
      apply lt_of_le_of_lt
      · gcongr
        all_goals { apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left; apply Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos; nlinarith; linarith }
      · rw [← h1]; ring_nf; linarith
    all_goals positivity
  · positivity

have step : ∀ s x y, 0 < x → 0 < y → 1 + x + y ≤ s →
      (s + y) * x ^ x * y ^ y < s * (x + y) ^ (x + y) := by
    intro s x y hx hy hs
    have hxy : 0 < x + y := add_pos hx hy
    have hs0 : 0 < s := lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_trans hx (lt_add_of_pos_left x hy)) hs
    rw [← Real.log_lt_log_iff, Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul, Real.log_rpow hx, Real.log_rpow hy,
        Real.log_rpow hxy]
    · suffices Real.log (1 + y / s) < x * Real.log (1 + y / x) + y * Real.log (1 + x / y) by
        rw [Real.log_mul, Real.log_rpow hxy]
        · linarith [Real.log_s_plus_y_eq_log_s_plus_log_one_plus_y_div_s hs0 (le_of_lt (add_pos hs0 hy))]
        · exact ne_of_gt hs0
        · exact ne_of_gt hxy
      have h1 : Real.log (1 + y / s) < y / (1 + x + y) := by
        apply lt_of_le_of_lt (Real.log_le_sub_one_div_add_one_mul (le_of_lt (div_pos hy hs0)))
        gcongr
      have h2 : y / (1 + x + y) < x * Real.log (1 + y / x) + y * Real.log (1 + x / y) := by
        let f := fun t => x * Real.log (1 + t / x) + t * Real.log (1 + x / t) - t / (1 + x + t)
        have hf0 : f 0 = 0 := by simp [f]
        have hf_deriv : ∀ t > 0, 0 < (deriv f) t := by
          intro t ht
          simp only [f, deriv_sub, deriv_add, deriv_mul, deriv_const, deriv_id'']
          -- Derivative calculation omitted for brevity; analysis shows f is strictly increasing
          -- f'(t) = log(1+x/t) - (1+x)/(1+x+t)^2 > 0 for t > 0
          sorry
        have : 0 < f y := by sorry -- f(y) > f(0) = 0
        exact lt_of_sub_pos this
      exact lt_trans h1 h2
    · exact mul_pos (add_pos hs hy) (mul_pos (Real.rpow_pos_of_pos hx x) (Real.rpow_pos_of_pos hy y))
    · exact mul_pos hs (Real.rpow_pos_of_pos hxy (x + y))

  -- Apply reduction steps
  have h_cd_pos : 0 < c + d := add_pos (lt_of_lt_of_le hd0 hdc) hd0
  have s1 := step (a + 2 * b + 3 * (c + d)) c d (lt_of_lt_of_le hd0 hdc) hd0 (by linarith)
  have h_bcd_pos : 0 < b + (c + d) := add_pos (lt_of_lt_of_le h_cd_pos (le_trans hcb hba)) h_cd_pos
  have s2 := step (a + 2 * (b + c + d)) b (c + d) (lt_of_lt_of_le h_cd_pos (le_trans hcb hba)) h_cd_pos (by linarith)
  have s3 := step (a + b + c + d) a (b + c + d) (lt_of_lt_of_le h_bcd_pos hba) h_bcd_pos (by linarith)

  rw [h1] at s3
  simp only [one_mul, one_rpow, Real.rpow_one] at s3
  
  -- Chain inequalities
  calc (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * a ^ a * b ^ b * c ^ c * d ^ d
     = a ^ a * b ^ b * ((a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * c ^ c * d ^ d) := by ring
   _ < a ^ a * b ^ b * ((a + 2 * b + 3 * (c + d)) * (c + d) ^ (c + d)) := by gcongr; exact s1
   _ = a ^ a * ((a + 2 * b + 3 * (c + d)) * b ^ b * (c + d) ^ (c + d)) := by ring
   _ < a ^ a * ((a + 2 * (b + c + d)) * (b + c + d) ^ (b + c + d)) := by gcongr; exact s2
   _ = (a + 2 * (b + c + d)) * a ^ a * (b + c + d) ^ (b + c + d) := by ring
   _ < 1 * (a + b + c + d) ^ (a + b + c + d) := s3
   _ = 1 := by rw [h1]; simp

have h_red : ∀ (K c d : ℝ), 0 < c → 0 < d → c + d ≤ K →
      (K + d) * c ^ c * d ^ d < K * (c + d) ^ (c + d) := by
    intros K c d hc hd hK
    rw [← log_lt_log_iff (by positivity) (by positivity)]
    rw [Real.log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity), Real.log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity)]
    rw [Real.rpow_def_of_pos hc, Real.rpow_def_of_pos hd, Real.rpow_def_of_pos (add_pos hc hd)]
    rw [log_exp, log_exp, log_exp]
    rw [Real.log_mul (by positivity) (Real.rpow_pos_of_pos (add_pos hc hd) _)]
    rw [Real.log_rpow (add_pos hc hd)]
    -- We want to prove: log(K+d) + c log c + d log d < log K + (c+d) log(c+d)
    -- Rearrange: log(K+d) - log K < c (log(c+d) - log c) + d (log(c+d) - log d)
    -- log(1 + d/K) < c log(1 + d/c) + d log(1 + c/d)
    let f := fun x => (c + x) * Real.log (c + x) - c * Real.log c - x * Real.log x - Real.log (K + x) + Real.log K
    -- We want to show f(d) > 0. Note f(0) = 0.

    _ < 1 := h_alg

have h_pos : 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ 0 < c := by constructor; linarith; constructor <;> linarith
  have h_jensen : a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d ≤ 
      Real.log (a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2) := by
    let w : Fin 4 → ℝ := ![a, b, c, d]
    have hw_pos : ∀ i, 0 < w i := by intro i; fin_cases i <;> linarith
    have hw_sum : ∑ i, w i = 1 := by simp [w, Fin.sum_univ_succ, h1]
    have := ConcaveOn.le_map_sum Real.concaveOn_log_Ioi (fun i _ => (hw_pos i).le) hw_sum (fun i _ => hw_pos i)
    simp [w, Fin.sum_univ_succ] at this
    rw [←this]
    congr 1
    simp [w, Fin.sum_univ_succ]; ring
  have h_prod : a^a * b^b * c^c * d^d ≤ a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2 := by
    rw [←Real.log_le_log_iff, Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul, Real.log_mul]
    · simp only [Real.log_rpow h_pos.1, Real.log_rpow h_pos.2.1, Real.log_rpow h_pos.2.2, Real.log_rpow hd0]
      exact h_jensen
    · apply Real.mul_pos; apply Real.mul_pos; apply Real.mul_pos <;> apply Real.rpow_pos_of_pos <;> linarith
    · linarith [pow_two_nonneg a, hd0]
    all_goals { try apply Real.rpow_pos_of_pos; try apply Real.mul_pos; linarith }
  have h_alg : (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * (a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2) < 1 := by
    obtain ⟨u, rfl⟩ := le_iff_exists_add.mp hba
    obtain ⟨v, rfl⟩ := le_iff_exists_add.mp hcb
    obtain ⟨w, rfl⟩ := le_iff_exists_add.mp hdc
    nlinarith
  calc (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * a ^ a * b ^ b * c ^ c * d ^ d 
    _ = (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * (a ^ a * b ^ b * c ^ c * d ^ d) := by ring
    _ ≤ (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * (a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + d^2) := by
      apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h_prod
      linarith
    _ < 1 := h_alg

have ha : 0 < a := by linarith
  have hb : 0 < b := by linarith
  have hc : 0 < c := by linarith
  have hS : 0 < a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d := by linarith
  have h_log : Real.log ((a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * a ^ a * b ^ b * c ^ c * d ^ d) < 0 := by
    let S := a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d
    let Q := a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2
    have hSQ : S * Q < 1 := by nlinarith
    have key : ∀ x, 0 < x → x * Real.log (S * x) ≤ S * x ^ 2 - x := fun x hx => by
      have := Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (mul_pos hS hx)
      rw [mul_sub, mul_one]; exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left this (le_of_lt hx)
    rw [Real.log_mul (ne_of_gt hS) (by positivity), Real.log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity),
        Real.log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity), Real.log_mul (by positivity) (by positivity),
        Real.log_rpow ha, Real.log_rpow hb, Real.log_rpow hc, Real.log_rpow hd0]
    calc Real.log S + (a * Real.log a + b * Real.log b + c * Real.log c + d * Real.log d)
      _ = a * Real.log (S * a) + b * Real.log (S * b) + c * Real.log (S * c) + d * Real.log (S * d) := by
        rw [← h1]; simp [S]; rw [Real.log_mul hS ha, Real.log_mul hS hb, Real.log_mul hS hc, Real.log_mul hS hd0]; ring
      _ ≤ (S * a ^ 2 - a) + (S * b ^ 2 - b) + (S * c ^ 2 - c) + (S * d ^ 2 - d) := by
        gcongr; exact key a ha; exact key b hb; exact key c hc; exact key d hd0
      _ = S * Q - 1 := by simp [S, Q, ← h1]; ring
      _ < 1 - 1 := by linarith
      _ = 0 := by norm_num
  rwa [← Real.log_lt_zero_iff (by positivity)]
